case_title: SEOANE, MANUEL MARTIN VS CHANDRAN, NAGARAJAN et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YAROSHENKO, ELENA
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY SEOANE, MANUEL MARTIN AS TO DEFENDANT CHANDRAN, NAGARAJAN YAROSHENKO, ELENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEOANE, MANUEL MARTIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHANDRAN, NAGARAJAN YAROSHENKO, ELENA $462.01 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $572.01, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $1320 AND ATTRIBUTES COMPARATIVE FAULT AT 65% TO PLAINTIFF AND 35% TO DEFENDANTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CHANDRAN, NAGARAJAN YAROSHENKO, ELENA
